evals.name: component-scaffold
evals.prompt: Create a React TypeScript component for a job listings card using Tailwind CSS.
evals.expected_output: A typed React functional component with props interface, Tailwind classes, and a default export.

evals.name: api-service-layer
evals.prompt: Create a frontend API service for fetching positions from the backend REST API.
evals.expected_output: TypeScript service module using fetch or axios with typed response interfaces and error handling.

evals.name: route-setup
evals.prompt: Set up React Router routes for Home, Login, Dashboard, and a 404 page.
evals.expected_output: Router configuration with typed routes, lazy loading where appropriate, and a fallback 404 route.

evals.name: tailwind-config
evals.prompt: Configure Tailwind CSS with a custom color palette matching the DZIRE brand.
evals.expected_output: tailwind.config.ts with extended theme colors, font family, and content paths set correctly.
